prompt: Scaffold a new business capability for claims processing. Namespace: FoodarooExperience, capability name: ClaimsProcessing, main aggregate: Claim. One command: FileClaim, emits ClaimFiled.

assertions.name: namespace-correct
assertions.description: Generated files use FoodarooExperience.ClaimsProcessing namespace throughout

assertions.name: cold-json-has-claim-lower
assertions.description: cold.json connection strings reference claims-processing (not a placeholder)
